M1.rationale_snippet: # Recommendation: Option C — Ecosystem-based adaptation as primary strategy

M2.rationale_snippet: **Recommendation: Option C — Ecosystem-based adaptation as the primary strategy.**

M3.rationale_snippet: I strongly recommend **Option D: Technology-and-resilience platform** as our primary adaptation strategy.

M4.rationale_snippet: I recommend **Option E: Social cohesion and human capital first** as the primary strategy.

M5.rationale_snippet: I recommend **Option C: Ecosystem-based adaptation** as the primary strategy. With 4,500 km of coastline and a $25 billion annual budget that cannot possibly armor every kilometer in concrete, this is the only approach that matches the geographic and fiscal scale of the threat. Mangrove and wetland

hidden_disagreement.interpretation: Moderate hidden disagreement: 3 agents recommended option C but differ on framing (mean RMSE = 0.60). Worth probing what each is emphasizing.

blind_spots.summary: No obvious blind spots detected in construct space.

M2: creating a false sense of security: a wall overtopped by a stronger-than-expected hurricane can fail catastrophically

risk_surface.note: Risks listed here were extracted by pattern matching on agent free responses. They are minority signals worth probing before acting on consensus.

operator_questions: Agents M1 (neutral), M2 (neutral), M5 (neutral) agreed on option C - but their reasoning differs (diversity=0.60). Which framing will drive execution? Different framings will produce different execution paths.
Option D was recommended only by M3 (neutral). What does this agent see that others missed - or what is it weighing differently?
Option E was recommended only by M4 (neutral). What does this agent see that others missed - or what is it weighing differently?
headline: Partial consensus on option C (3/5); remaining agents split. Worth probing the dissent before acting.
